ter:brightness(1.1);transform:translateY(-2px);} /* ── TEAM ── */ .teamGrid{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:clamp(18px,3.5vw,44px);flex-wrap:wrap;} .teamCard{width:clamp(250px,34vw,330px);background:var(--surf);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rLg);padding:clamp(28px,3.8vw,46px) clamp(18px,2.5vw,26px);text-align:center;backdrop-filter:blur(12px);transition:transform .35s,box-shadow .35s;} .teamCard:hover{transform:translateY(-10px);box-shadow:0 30px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.48);} .avRing{width:clamp(96px,13vw,124px);height:clamp(96px,13vw,124px);margin:0 auto clamp(16px,2.2vw,24px);border-radius:50%;padding:3px;background:conic-gradient(var(--sky),var(--ice),#fff,var(--sky));animation:rSpin 6s linear infinite;} .teamCard:hover .avRing{animation-play-state:paused;} @keyframes rSpin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}} .avInner{width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bg);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3.8vw,2.7rem);font-weight:800;color:var(--t1);} .teamCard h2{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.35rem,2vw,1.75rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:4px;} .teamRole{display:block;color:var(--sky);font-size:clamp(.65rem,.76vw,.76rem);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:clamp(11px,1.4vw,15px);} .teamBio{color:var(--t3);font-size:clamp(.83rem,.95vw,.93rem);line-height:1.78;margin-bottom:18px;} .teamSocials{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:10px;} .teamSocials a{width:36px;height:36px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--t3);text-decoration:none;font-size:.85rem;transition:all .3s;} .teamSocials a:hover{border-color:var(--sky);color:var(--sky);background:rgba(14,165,233,.08);} /* ── TESTIMONIALS STRIP ── */ .(11px,1.4vw,15px) clamp(13px,1.7vw,18px);background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--rSm);color:var(--t2);font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(.86rem,.98vw,.96rem);outline:none;transition:all .3s;-webkit-appearance:none;} .fgrp input:focus,.fgrp textarea:focus,.fgrp select:focus{border-color:var(--sky);background:rgba(14,165,233,.04);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(14,165,233,.09);} .fgrp select option{background:var(--bg);} .fgrp textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:clamp(85px,11vw,115px);} .frow{display:flex;gap:11px;} .frow .fgrp{flex:1;} .ffile{position:relative;} .ffileIn{position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0;cursor:pointer;z-index:2;} .ffileLbl{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:clamp(16px,2.4vw,22px);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);border:2px dashed rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:var(--rSm);color:var(--t4);transition:all .3s;text-align:center;} .ffileIn:hover+.ffileLbl{border-color:var(--sky);background:rgba(14,165,233,.04);color:var(--sky);} .ffileLbl i{font-size:clamp(1.3rem,2vw,1.7rem);margin-bottom:6px;} .ffileLbl span{font-size:clamp(.78rem,.88vw,.86rem);} .ffileLbl small{font-size:clamp(.68rem,.78vw,.76rem);opacity:.58;margin-top:3px;} .btnSubmit{width:100%;padding:clamp(13px,1.8vw,17px);background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--sky),var(--ice));color:#fff;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:clamp(.86rem,1.05vw,.98rem);border:none;border-radius:var(--rSm);cursor:pointer;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px;margin-top:7px;transition:all .3s;} .btnSubmit:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 13px 30px var(--glow);filter:brightness(1.08);} footer{background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);padding:clamp(28px,4vw,44px) clamp(18px,6vw,90px);border-top:1px solid var(--border);} .footerInner{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:20px;max-width:1060px;margin:0 auto;} .footLogo{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--t1);text-decoration:none;} .footLogo em{color:var(--sky);font-style:normal;} .footLinks{display:flex;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;} .footLinks a{color:var(--t4);text-decoration:none;font-size:.78rem;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color .25s;} .footLinks a:hover{color:var(--sky);} .footSocials{display:flex;gap:10px;} .footSocials a{width:34px;height:34px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--t4);text-decoration:none;font-size:.8rem;transition:all .3s;} .footSocials a:hover{border-color:var(--sky);color:var(--sky);} .footCopy{width:100%;text-align:center;color:var(--t4);font-size:.75rem;padding-top:18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);margin-top:10px;} /* ── FLOATING BUTTONS ── */ .fab{position:fixed;right:22px;z-index:900;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;align-items:flex-end;} .fab{bottom:22px;} .fabBtn{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1rem;cursor:pointer;border:none;transition:all .3s;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.4);} .fabWa{background:#25D366;color:#fff;} .fabWa:hover{background:#1da851;transform:scale(1.1);} .fabTop{background:rgba(14,165,233,.15);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.3);color:var(--sky);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s,transform .3s;} .fabTop.show{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;} .fabTop:hover{background:rgba(14,165,233,.25);transform:translateY(-3px);} /* ── TOAST ── */ #toast{position:fixed;bottom:80px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(20px);background:rgba(14,165,233,.15);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.3);border-radius:var(--rSm);padding:14px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;color:var(--t1);font-size:.9rem;z-index:9999;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:all .4s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);} #toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);} #toast i{color:var(--sky);font-size:1.1rem;} /* ── SCROLL REVEAL ── */ .rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(50px);transition:opacity .95s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),transform .95s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);} .rv.on{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);} .pv{opacity:0;transform:scale(.88) translateY(26px);transition:opacity .75s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),transform .75s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);} .pv.on{opacity:1;transform:scale(1) translateY(0);} [data-d="1"]{transition-delay:.07s;}[data-d="2"]{transition-delay:.14s;} [data-d="3"]{transition-delay:.21s;}[data-d="4"]{transition-delay:.28s;}[data-d="5"]{transition-delay:.35s;} /* ── HERO FLOAT-UP ── */ .heroEl{opacity:0;transform:translateY(90px);filter:blur(4px);} .heroEl.rise{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);filter:blur(0);transition:opacity 1s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),transform 1s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),filter .8s ease;} .heroEl.rise[data-hd="1"]{transition-delay:.18s;} .heroEl.rise[data-hd="2"]{transition-delay:.34s;} .heroEl.rise[data-hd="3"]{transition-delay:.5s;} /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */ @media(max-width:900px){ .navLinks{display:none;} .ham{display:flex;} .mobMenu{display:flex;} .contactWrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;} } @media(max-width:640px){ .pricingGrid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} .frow{flex-direction:column;gap:0;} .footerInner{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;} .footLinks,.footSocials{justify-content:center;} } @media(max-width:520px){ section{padding-left:16px;padding-right:16px;} .cardsGrid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} .teamGrid{flex-direction:column;align-items:center;} .teamCard{width:100%;max-width:330px;} .heroTitle br{display:none;} .oC{display:none;} } @media(max-width:360px){.heroTitle{font-size:1.9rem;}}

How We Work

Our Proven Blueprint

A streamlined, transparent process from concept to launch — no surprises, just results. Click each step to learn more.

01

Discovery & Strategy

We dive deep into your local market, analyze competitors, and map out a digital strategy tailored to your goals.

  • In-depth competitor landscape analysis
  • Target audience persona mapping
  • Market positioning and keyword research
  • Project scope, timeline, and milestone planning
02

Design & Prototyping

Our team crafts a visually arresting, highly functional prototype before a single line of code is written.

  • Wireframes and information architecture
  • High-fidelity Figma mockups
  • Interactive prototype for client review
  • Brand integration and design system setup
03

Development & QA

We code it for maximum performance, scalability, and accessibility — then rigorously test across all devices.

  • Clean, semantic, and performant code
  • Cross-browser and cross-device QA testing
  • Performance audits (Core Web Vitals)
  • Accessibility compliance (WCAG 2.1)
04

Launch & Scale

We deploy your digital storefront and initiate local SEO protocols for immediate visibility and long-term growth.

  • Staged deployment and rollback plan
  • Google Search Console and Analytics setup
  • Initial local SEO and GMB optimization
  • 30-day post-launch monitoring and support

Transparent Pricing

Simple, Honest Plans

No hidden fees. No lock-in surprises. Choose the plan that fits your ambitions and grow from there.
